free_text: Typed attachment grid (MS ARECO Schedule A 12.31.16): assets are columns; rows are attribute buckets (Value of Asset; Type of Income; Amount of Income: Current Year; Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016). EIF row blank for all columns. Value of Asset = A: None for all three assets; Amount of Income Current Year = A: None for all three. Page __ of __ blank in header.

uncertainties.note: Preceding-year C bucket bar spans the AINV and AIT columns continuously (confirmed in BL+BR quadrants); low-res full page could be misread as AINV only.
